description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a dark metallic finish and angular contours. The main body is elongated, with a prominent, pointed barrel and a secondary, smaller blade-like attachment beneath the muzzle, suggesting a bayonet or breaching tool. The rear section includes a compact grip and a metallic trigger guard, with a visible lever or pump mechanism integrated into the body. The surface is mostly matte with some glossy highlights, and the construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer or composite elements. The overall form is aggressive and modern, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The object is detailed with visible screws, seams, and mechanical components, emphasizing its functional and utilitarian nature.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a dark metallic finish, angular body, and integrated bayonet or breaching tool. Features a compact grip, visible lever or pump, and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed barrel and symmetrical alignment, with the bayonet attachment visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated body, angular contours, and the full length of the barrel and bayonet attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact grip, trigger guard, and the end of the barrel, with mechanical details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same elongated body and attachments, with additional detail on the lever or pump mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, elongated with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a slim profile and no visible finger grooves
